positive: A stylized, graphic illustration of a celestial fox (kitsune) with nine tails, rendered in a minimalist yet richly detailed neo-traditional tattoo style. The fox should be coiled in a meditative, graceful pose, surrounded by stylized glowing astral symbols, crescent moons, and ethereal cosmic dust swirls. Use a limited color palette dominated by deep indigo, glowing cyan, cosmic violet, and sharp gold accents. The composition must be central, high contrast, and easily readable on fabric. Emphasis on strong, bold black outlines and negative space to enhance the silhouette effect. Vector art feel, intricate linework, deep shadows, illuminated subject, highly detailed pattern.
negative: blurry, low resolution, cropped, out of frame, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, grain, realistic photo, 3d render, jpeg artifacts
